levels.basic: Foundational understanding and limited hands-on experience.

aiGenerator.title: AI skill generator
aiGenerator.description: Describe your experience and let AI suggest skills with recommended proficiency levels.
aiGenerator.promptPlaceholder: Example: I work as a frontend developer, build React applications, collaborate with designers, and recently started working with testing and accessibility.

examples.beginner: I’m new to product design and want to understand UX research, wireframing, and prototyping.
examples.dataScience: I analyze data in Python, use pandas daily, and want to grow into machine learning.
examples.fullStack: I build full-stack web apps with React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, and REST APIs.
examples.mobileUx: I design mobile app interfaces, run usability testing, and work closely with product teams.
examples.devOps: I manage CI/CD pipelines, Dockerized services, cloud deployments, and infrastructure automation.

results.title: Generated suggestions
results.subtitle: Select the skills you want to add.

errors.promptTooShort: Please enter a more detailed description before generating skills.
errors.generate: AI skills could not be generated.

verificationQuiz.title: Skill verification quiz
verificationQuiz.incompleteWarning: You have answered {answered} of {total} questions. Answer all questions before submitting.

resume.title: Resume previous attempt
resume.description: You already have an unfinished verification attempt for this skill. You can continue it or start over.

errors.load: The verification quiz could not be loaded.
errors.noQuestions: No verification questions are available for this skill yet.
errors.authRequired: You must be signed in to start verification.
errors.incompleteAttempt: An unfinished verification attempt already exists.
errors.submit: The quiz could not be submitted.
errors.startOver: A new verification attempt could not be started.

messages.expert: Excellent result. You demonstrated expert-level understanding.
messages.advanced: Strong result. You demonstrated advanced-level understanding.
messages.intermediate: Solid result. You reached an intermediate level.
messages.keepLearning: Keep going. A bit more practice should improve your result.

achievedLevel.title: Achieved level
achievedLevel.passedDescription: This level can now be applied to your skill profile.
achievedLevel.failedDescription: You did not reach the minimum threshold to apply this level.

errors.apply: The verified level could not be applied.

page.title: Generate your skill profile
page.description: Describe your experience, goals, or recent work and let AI build a clearer picture of your current skills.

describe.title: Describe your background
describe.description: Share what you do, what you have built, and where you want to grow.

analyze.title: AI analyzes your experience
analyze.description: SkillHub identifies relevant skills and suggested proficiency levels.

recommend.title: Review and save
recommend.description: Select the skills you want to keep and improve your recommendations.

form.label: What have you worked on recently?
form.placeholder: Describe your role, projects, tools, and goals. The more context you provide, the better the suggestions will be.

saveTime.title: Save time
saveTime.description: Skip manual skill entry and start from AI-generated suggestions.

accurateProficiency.title: Review proficiency levels
accurateProficiency.description: Check the suggested level before adding each skill to your profile.

betterRecommendations.title: Get better recommendations
betterRecommendations.description: A stronger skill profile leads to more relevant course suggestions.

hiddenSkills.title: Spot hidden skills
hiddenSkills.description: AI often identifies skills you use regularly but never thought to add.

success.title: Skills added successfully
success.description: Your profile has been updated, and future recommendations can use these skills right away.

errors.promptTooShort: Please provide a longer description before generating skills.
errors.generate: AI skills could not be generated right now.
errors.selectSkills: Select at least one skill before saving.
errors.partialAdd: {count} skills were added, but some items failed: {errors}
errors.addSkills: Selected skills could not be added.

welcome.title: Meet the AI skill generator
welcome.description: Describe your experience once and let SkillHub turn it into a clearer skill profile.

describe.title: Give it context
describe.description: Include tools, projects, responsibilities, and the kind of work you want to grow into.

review.title: Review before saving
review.description: You stay in control. Pick only the skills and levels that match your real experience.

analyzing.label: Analyzing your input
analyzing.description: Reading your background and identifying relevant experience.

generating.label: Generating suggestions
generating.description: Building a list of skill suggestions and recommended levels.

complete.label: Ready to review
complete.description: Your skill suggestions are ready for editing and selection.

templates.title: Example prompts
templates.description: Use one of these as a starting point if you are unsure what to write.

items.frontend: I am a frontend developer working mainly with React, TypeScript, component libraries, accessibility, and performance optimization.
items.csGraduate: I recently graduated in computer science and built projects in Java, algorithms, SQL, and cloud basics.
items.marketing: I work in digital marketing, run paid campaigns, analyze funnel performance, and collaborate on landing pages and email automation.
items.businessAnalyst: I work as a business analyst, gather requirements, write documentation, map processes, and work closely with delivery teams.
items.selfTaught: I am self-taught, built several web apps, and learned JavaScript, APIs, databases, and deployment by shipping projects.
items.uxDesigner: I design interfaces, run usability tests, create wireframes, and collaborate with product and engineering on user flows.
items.productManager: I manage product discovery, roadmap planning, stakeholder alignment, and experiment design across cross-functional teams.
items.careerChange: I am changing careers from operations into tech and have been learning spreadsheets, SQL, Python, dashboards, and business intelligence.
items.javaDeveloper: I am a Java developer working with Spring Boot, REST APIs, SQL databases, testing, and backend architecture.
items.devops: I work with CI/CD pipelines, Docker, cloud infrastructure, monitoring, and infrastructure as code.
items.mobile: I build mobile apps, design responsive user flows, integrate APIs, and improve performance on iOS and Android.
items.dataAnalyst: I analyze business data, create dashboards, write SQL queries, and use Python to clean and interpret datasets.
